<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get an approval task"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/app-versions/{id}/approvals/{task_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gives back an approval task by task Id.
